parameters.query: UPDATE bookings SET status = 'CANCELLED', cancelled_at = NOW(), cancellation_reason = 'GCal Event Deleted' WHERE gcal_event_id = $1::text AND status != 'CANCELLED' RETURNING id, user_id;
UPDATE bookings SET gcal_synced_at = NOW(), status = CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING' THEN 'CONFIRMED' ELSE status END WHERE gcal_event_id = $1::text RETURNING id;
